prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy intent icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate compact HUD icon sheet for enemy intent states as an opaque chroma-key source.
Subject: four icons in a clean 2x2 sheet: attack sword or claw, block shield, attack-plus-block crossed weapon and shield, unknown warning intent.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D UI icons, extremely readable at small HUD scale.
Composition/framing: 2x2 sheet, equal-size icons, centered, high contrast, no clipping.
Color palette: attack red and orange, block blue and silver, combined purple and gold, warning amber; no magenta inside icon art.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: one exact background color #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no frame; no panel; no matte backdrop; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any icon.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
